title: Bethesda confirms Fallout 3 and New Vegas remasters and announces its roadmap with Fallout 5 and The Elder Scrolls 6
summary: The company reaffirms its commitment to Starfield, announces new content for 2027, and assures that The Elder Scrolls 6 is its main development priority.

title: Studio ZA/UM, creator of Disco Elysium, announces mass layoffs following poor performance of Zero Parades
summary: The studio plans to lay off up to 32 employees as it cannot sustain its current size after the commercial failure of the game.

title: Marathon director Joe Ziegler leaves Bungie during turbulent times for the studio
summary: The veteran developer leaves the studio four months after the game's launch to start a new project at another company.

title: Battlefield 6 includes a Top Gun crossover and the return of Carrier Assault mode in its Season 4
summary: The new season of DICE's game includes cosmetics from the film and brings back a 20-year-old classic game mode.

title: Stardew Valley joins Magic: The Gathering with three special Secret Lair card collections
summary: The collaboration includes thematic drops from the popular farming game that promise to sell out quickly.

title: Analysts debunk the multi-million dollar GTA 6 pre-order figures but call it the biggest pre-sale in history
summary: Analysis firms consider some viral estimates of pre-order revenue 'absurd,' but confirm the campaign has been the strongest ever recorded.

title: Blizzard corrects and reverses the most controversial changes of Diablo 4 Season 14
summary: The developer acknowledges that 'not all ideas work' and releases a patch that undoes the criticized changes to Mythic items.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced surpasses three million copies sold worldwide
summary: Ubisoft confirms the commercial success of the remake of the classic pirate game on all available platforms.

title: GameStop CEO declares that physical format is 'totally irrelevant' to the chain's business
summary: Ryan Cohen states that the company no longer depends on disc game sales and that the digital market is the future.

title: Aliens, James Cameron's iconic sci-fi sequel, celebrates its 40th anniversary
summary: The 137-minute masterpiece and two-time Oscar winner is remembered for redefining the sequel genre in the Hollywood industry.

title: Netflix defends its video game strategy with 600% growth in its business
summary: The platform bets on the new thriller from the Oxenfree studio while stating that the gaming sector remains a growing priority.

title: Christopher Nolan generates excitement and controversy with his upcoming film The Odyssey
summary: As fans speculate about the characters, it is reported that a scene could trigger epileptic seizures due to its aggressive visual flashes.

title: Star Wars KOTOR remake still in development, aims for 2028 release
summary: Sabre Interactive confirms that the anticipated project is still alive and in advanced production.

title: Marvel Comics leaves New York after 87 years to move its headquarters to Los Angeles
summary: The publisher's move is a hard blow to the New York comic book industry and a change of era for the company.

title: Saudi Arabia's purchase of EA clears last major regulatory hurdle in the European Union
summary: The agreement to acquire the video game giant moves towards final approval by competition authorities.

title: Disney temporarily closes its stores due to violence from Lorcana card resellers
summary: Local community safety forces the closure of establishments after clashes between scalpers over the new batch.

title: Disney accused of generating low-quality children's content with artificial intelligence
summary: The company faces criticism for using generative AI tools to produce animations intended for children.

title: Analysts predict premature death of Nintendo Switch as its lifecycle nears end
summary: Nintendo's flagship console could see its production halted much sooner than players expected.

title: Mega Crit releases major content update for Slay the Spire 2 beta
summary: The studio continues refining the anticipated deck-building roguelike with new content and bug fixes.

title: Hytale offers massive look at development with 22 videos and 37 new images
summary: The anticipated adventure and construction game reveals a large amount of unseen material and gameplay features.
